steps.title: Find the contextual signal
steps.content: The sentence describes a juxtaposition — a combining — of "sleek, contemporary elements" and "traditional organic materials" in a single design. The blank names this combining.

steps.title: Match the word
steps.content:
"Synthesis" means combining distinct elements into a unified whole — exactly the relationship described.

(B) "designation" = naming. (C) "analysis" = breaking apart (opposite). (D) "diffusion" = spreading out, not combining.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
